title: Image2 클레이 - Clay Clay Hello Flower
summary: Image2 Hub의 일러스트 / 클레이 카테고리에서 가져온 이미지 생성 스타일입니다. 한국어 텍스트가 필요한 장면은 한국어 라벨과 카피를 사용하도록 조정했습니다.
prompt:
3D illustration, clay style, soft plastic material, toy-like character design,

artistic abstract sculpting, dopamine color palette,

soft studio lighting, global illumination, soft shadows,

pastel base tones with vibrant accents,

centered composition, single hero object, clean background,

floating decorative elements,

sticker collage details, UI labels, badges, playful icons (stars, music notes, shapes),

micro typography, fictional brand text,

joyful, playful, whimsical yet well-designed,

editorial-grade quality, Behance / Awwwards standard.

— Theme: "HELLO!" retro TV flower planter Use Korean-language copy, labels, captions, titles, and UI text wherever text appears; keep all text readable and culturally natural for Korean users.
